title: Rehabilitation of the M'Sila Urban Wadi Corridor
author: Master 2 Urbanisme Studio
summary: A master's thesis project proposing ecological and public-space rehabilitation of M'Sila's urban waterway network, reconnecting neighborhoods to the wadi.

title: Smart Mobility Dashboard for M'Sila
author: Gestion des Villes Studio
summary: An interactive dashboard concept tracking traffic flow and public transport coverage across the city, designed for the municipal planning office.

title: VRD Network Design for a New Residential Zone
author: Génie Urbain Studio
summary: Complete road, water and sanitation network design for a proposed residential extension, developed in Civil 3D.

title: PDAU Revision Simulation — Central District
author: Licence 3 Urbanisme
summary: A student simulation of a master-plan revision exercise for the city's central district, applied through GIS land-use layers.

title: UrbanFix DZ — Civic Risk Reporting App
author: Urban Pioneers Club
summary: A civic-tech web application letting M'Sila residents report urban risks (potholes, flooding, unsafe structures) directly to planning authorities.

title: Green Corridor Concept for the University District
author: Master 1 Urbanisme
summary: A landscape-led urban design proposal linking IGTU's campus to nearby residential areas through shaded pedestrian corridors.
